---
title: ""
---

::: {.contact-hero}
# Contact

We welcome inquiries regarding research collaboration, student opportunities, and academic exchange.
:::

::: {.contact-wrap}

::: {.contact-card}
## Address

NP505  
College of Pharmacy  
The Catholic University of Korea  
43, Jibong-ro, Wonmi-gu, Bucheon-si, Gyeonggi-do 14662  
Republic of Korea
:::

::: {.contact-card}
## Email

[**yongyeon@catholic.ac.kr**](mailto:yongyeon@catholic.ac.kr)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
## Opportunities

We welcome motivated students and collaborators interested in **Biochemistry, Molecular Biology, Cell Biology, Bioinformatics, Structural Biology,** and **Computational Biology**.
:::

:::
